# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

# ARM Template Azure Functions Managed Identity 
Parameters:
    storageAccountNamePrefix: '<storage_account>' # Required parameter, Storage account name prefix   [AZ01]        
    keyVaultResourceGroupName: '<keyvault_rg>'     # Optional parameter - Key Vault Resource Group Name       [AZKV01](Not required if you want to use Azure Managed Identity) 
    location: 'westeurope'                       # Location of the resources. Required and should be same as what created storage account or key vault   [LOC02]    
ParametersMapping: ['ParameterValues']          # Parameter mapping mode - Defaults to Allowed Values if not specified (AZPV1) 
    allowedIdSourcesListLabel_parameterNameInUse : '<id>'        # List of Identity sources that the template will grant permission on. Required for parameter store usage   [ALID03]        
Resources:                                  # ARM Template Resources block          (AZRN01) 
    Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts:       // Storage account resources           ([STOR02])       
     - name: '{concat(parameters('storageAccountNamePrefix'), randomString())}'                   ,   location : parameters ('location')                  ; type:'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', 7,8]         [AZSAA1](Secrets Manager not required)          .json           
     - name: '{concat(parameters('keyVaultResourceGroupName'), '/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/{element}/accessPolicies')}'; type:'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', 7,8]       [AZKVA2](Secrets Manager not required)
    Microsoft.Cosmos/databaseAccounts:   // Cosm DB resource block                    ([CDAA01])        
     - name : '{concat(parameters('keyVaultResourceGroupName'), '/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts')}'; location:'westeurope']; type:@CrossAzureSubscriptionReaderRole; accessPolicies:crossSubscriptionDelegation   [CDCA01]          .json
    Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults:      // Key Vault resources block                     ([KVAU02])        
     - name:'{concat(parameters('keyVaultResourceGroupName'), '/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults')}'; location : 'westeurope']; type:@Contributor; accessPolicies:['B2C Key Vault Admin']   [KVAUA01](Secrets Manager not required)          .json          
    Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments:// Role assignments resource block      ([RAASN])         # Assigned role permissions     (AZRPNT3]  for example, 'assign permission to a user or group')       [ALI04](Secrets Manager not required)          .json   
ParametersMapping: AllowedValues   // Parameter mapping mode - Defaults to all allowed values if this parameter is absent when template is being deployed (AZPV1)(Not Required in ARM Template)[ ]     # You should set the parameters below only for specific use-cases where you have full control over resource configurations 
    storageAccountPermissions: ['Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/*', 'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/*']   // List of Permission Level strings to be used in ARM template [AZSPL02](Secrets Manager not required)          .json      # Use only when you have full control over resource configurations
